The green grow stopped after 4 actions (noop_short_circuit). This means the green item reached its limit. Now all 4 items (orange, yellow, blue, green) can't grow anymore. Let me check the current state and think about what to do next.
Since all items can't grow anymore, maybe I need to SHRINK some items using the left U-shapes. Let me check the current state first.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
items = [n for n in seg if n['color'] in ['Y', 'N', 'O', 'S'] and n['pixels'] > 10]
print("Colored items:")
for s in sorted(items, key=lambda x: x['pixels'], reverse=True):
    print(f"  color={s['color']} pixels={s['pixels']} boundary={s['boundary']}")

# Purple objects
p_objects = [n for n in seg if n['color'] == 'p']
print(f"\nPurple objects: {len(p_objects)}, total pixels={sum(p['pixels'] for p in p_objects)}")

# Red dots
reds = [n for n in seg if n['color'] == 'r']
print(f"\nRed dots: {len(reds)}")
for r in reds:
    print(f"  boundary={r['boundary']}")

# Total item pixels
total = sum(s['pixels'] for s in items)
print(f"\nTotal item pixels: {total}")
print(f"Target (purple): {sum(p['pixels'] for p in p_objects)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
